meaning: adj.无伪装的,不戴假面具的,公开的
examples: Hean looked down at Bauer in undisguised disgust.
Frances beamed at her friend with undisguised admiration.
She looked at him with immediate and undisguised contempt.
As a child, I read the epic fantasy with an undisguised affection like so many others.
On June 29th oil markets responded to the latest euro summit with undisguised, and unmerited, glee.
